title: Tesla's push into AI and robotics is proving costly
excerpt: Tesla revenue jumped on record vehicle deliveries in Q2, but operating profit dipped because of heavy spending on R&D.
content_html:
Tesla's massive investments in humanoid robots, self-driving cars and AI chips are hurting profits, but the company says it'll all pay off down the line.

Why it matters: CEO Elon Musk indicated he's "never been more optimistic about the future," but acknowledged the investments could lead to uneven results.

Zoom in: Tesla revenue jumped on record vehicle deliveries in the second quarter, but the company saw a significant dip in operating profit because of its heavy spending on R&D.

  • Tesla plans to spend more than $25 billion on capital investments this year, and that spending rate will grow over the the next two or three years, CFO Vaibhav Taneja told investors and analysts on a call late Wednesday.
  • Additionally, Tesla plans to borrow as much as $30 billion to accelerate its investments in robotaxis, Optimus robots, semiconductors, solar manufacturing and AI compute infrastructure, he said.

"We're investing a lot in growing the core business and really preparing for the future," Musk said on the call. "So this is a massive capex year, but I'm confident that all the things that we're investing in will yield incredible returns — really, maybe the best capex returns that we've ever seen."

By the numbers: Tesla reported Q2 revenue of $28 billion, up 23% year over year.

  • Net income was $1.1 billion, down 5% compared to a year ago, and essentially flat with the last three quarters.
  • Operating margin fell to just 1.4%, compared to 4.1% a year ago.

State of play: Tesla began production of its driverless Cybercab in Texas during the quarter, but Musk said its Robotaxi service is rolling out cautiously to ensure safety.

  • Tesla Semi remains on track for production later this year at a new factory in Nevada, but Musk said autonomous trucking is not a priority until next year.
  • The company said it's making progress to expand battery pack manufacturing capacity, which it called "the main limiting factor to near-term vehicle production volume increase."
  • Tesla tore out assembly lines for its discontinued Model S and X cars at its Fremont, Calif., factory and expects Optimus humanoid robot production to begin there later this year.
  • Musk acknowledged that scaling Optimus production will be difficult. "This is going to be the hardest product to scale manufacturing that we've ever made at Tesla, because everything on the robot is new."

The bottom line: Tesla's focus is always over the horizon.

sentences.zh: 特斯拉在人形机器人、自动驾驶汽车和人工智能芯片方面的大规模投资正在损害利润，但该公司表示，这一切都会得到回报。为什么重要：首席执行官埃隆·马斯克表示，他“对未来从未如此乐观”，但承认这些投资可能会导致结果参差不齐。

sentences.en: Zoom in: Tesla revenue jumped on record vehicle deliveries in the second quarter, but the company saw a significant dip in operating profit because of its heavy spending on R&D.Tesla plans to spend more than $25 billion on capital investments this year, and that spending rate will grow over the the next two or three years, CFO Vaibhav Taneja told investors and analysts on a call late Wednesday.Additionally, Tesla plans to borrow as much as $30 billion to accelerate its investments in robotaxis, Optimus robots, semiconductors, solar manufacturing and AI compute infrastructure, he said."We're investing a lot in growing the core business and really preparing for the future," Musk said on the call.
sentences.zh: 放大：特斯拉第二季度的收入因创纪录的车辆交付量而猛增，但由于研发支出庞大，该公司的营业利润大幅下降。首席财务官 Vaibhav Taneja 在周三晚间的电话会议上告诉投资者和分析师，特斯拉计划今年在资本投资上花费超过 250 亿美元，并且未来两到三年内支出率将会增长。此外，特斯拉计划借款高达 300 亿美元，以加速其在机器人出租车、擎天柱机器人、他说，半导体、太阳能制造和人工智能计算基础设施。“我们正在大力投资发展核心业务，并真正为未来做好准备，”马斯克在电话会议上表示。

sentences.en: "So this is a massive capex year, but I'm confident that all the things that we're investing in will yield incredible returns — really, maybe the best capex returns that we've ever seen."By the numbers: Tesla reported Q2 revenue of $28 billion, up 23% year over year.
sentences.zh: “因此，今年是资本支出规模巨大的一年，但我相信我们投资的所有项目都将产生令人难以置信的回报——实际上，这可能是我们见过的最好的资本支出回报。”从数字来看：特斯拉报告第二季度收入为 280 亿美元，同比增长 23%。

sentences.en: Net income was $1.1 billion, down 5% compared to a year ago, and essentially flat with the last three quarters.
sentences.zh: 净利润为11亿美元，同比下降5%，与前三个季度基本持平。

sentences.en: Operating margin fell to just 1.4%, compared to 4.1% a year ago.State of play: Tesla began production of its driverless Cybercab in Texas during the quarter, but Musk said its Robotaxi service is rolling out cautiously to ensure safety.Tesla Semi remains on track for production later this year at a new factory in Nevada, but Musk said autonomous trucking is not a priority until next year.The company said it's making progress to expand battery pack manufacturing capacity, which it called "the main limiting factor to near-term vehicle production volume increase."
sentences.zh: 营业利润率降至仅 1.4%，而去年同期为 4.1%。 现状：特斯拉本季度开始在德克萨斯州生产无人驾驶 Cybercab，但马斯克表示，其 Robotaxi 服务正在谨慎推出，以确保安全。Tesla Semi 仍有望在今年晚些时候在内华达州的一家新工厂进行生产，但马斯克表示，直到明年，自动驾驶卡车运输才会成为优先事项。该公司表示，在扩大电池组制造能力方面正在取得进展，这被称为“主要限制因素”近期汽车产量增加。”

sentences.en: Tesla tore out assembly lines for its discontinued Model S and X cars at its Fremont, Calif., factory and expects Optimus humanoid robot production to begin there later this year.Musk acknowledged that scaling Optimus production will be difficult.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉拆除了位于加利福尼亚州弗里蒙特工厂的已停产 Model S 和 X 汽车的装配线，预计 Optimus 人形机器人生产将于今年晚些时候开始。马斯克承认，扩大 Optimus 生产规模将很困难。

sentences.en: "This is going to be the hardest product to scale manufacturing that we've ever made at Tesla, because everything on the robot is new."
sentences.zh: “这将是我们在特斯拉生产的最难规模化生产的产品，因为机器人上的所有东西都是新的。”

sentences.en: The bottom line: Tesla's focus is always over the horizon.
sentences.zh: 底线：特斯拉的焦点始终在地平线之外。

blocks.html_en: • Additionally, Tesla plans to borrow as much as $30 billion to accelerate its investments in robotaxis, Optimus robots, semiconductors, solar manufacturing and AI compute infrastructure, he said.

blocks.html_en: "We're investing a lot in growing the core business and really preparing for the future," Musk said on the call. "So this is a massive capex year, but I'm confident that all the things that we're investing in will yield incredible returns — really, maybe the best capex returns that we've ever seen."

sentences.zh: “我们正在投入大量资金来发展核心业务，并真正为未来做好准备，”马斯克在电话会议上表示。

sentences.en: "So this is a massive capex year, but I'm confident that all the things that we're investing in will yield incredible returns — really, maybe the best capex returns that we've ever seen."
sentences.zh: “因此，今年是资本支出规模巨大的一年，但我相信我们投资的所有项目都将产生令人难以置信的回报——实际上，也许是我们见过的最好的资本支出回报。”

blocks.html_en: • Tesla tore out assembly lines for its discontinued Model S and X cars at its Fremont, Calif., factory and expects Optimus humanoid robot production to begin there later this year.

sentences.en: Tesla tore out assembly lines for its discontinued Model S and X cars at its Fremont, Calif., factory and expects Optimus humanoid robot production to begin there later this year.

sentences.zh: 马斯克承认，扩大擎天柱的生产规模将会很困难。

sentences.en: "This is going to be the hardest product to scale manufacturing that we've ever made at Tesla, because everything on the robot is new."
sentences.zh: “这将是我们在特斯拉生产的最难规模化生产的产品，因为机器人上的所有东西都是新的。”

content_html_zh:
特斯拉在人形机器人、自动驾驶汽车和人工智能芯片方面的大规模投资正在损害利润，但该公司表示，这一切都会得到回报。为什么重要：首席执行官埃隆·马斯克表示，他“对未来从未如此乐观”，但承认这些投资可能会导致结果参差不齐。

放大：特斯拉第二季度的收入因创纪录的车辆交付量而猛增，但由于研发支出庞大，该公司的营业利润大幅下降。首席财务官 Vaibhav Taneja 在周三晚间的电话会议上告诉投资者和分析师，特斯拉计划今年在资本投资上花费超过 250 亿美元，并且未来两到三年内支出率将会增长。此外，特斯拉计划借款高达 300 亿美元，以加速其在机器人出租车、擎天柱机器人、他说，半导体、太阳能制造和人工智能计算基础设施。“我们正在大力投资发展核心业务，并真正为未来做好准备，”马斯克在电话会议上表示。 “因此，今年是资本支出规模巨大的一年，但我相信我们投资的所有项目都将产生令人难以置信的回报——实际上，这可能是我们见过的最好的资本支出回报。”从数字来看：特斯拉报告第二季度收入为 280 亿美元，同比增长 23%。 净利润为11亿美元，同比下降5%，与前三个季度基本持平。 营业利润率降至仅 1.4%，而去年同期为 4.1%。 现状：特斯拉本季度开始在德克萨斯州生产无人驾驶 Cybercab，但马斯克表示，其 Robotaxi 服务正在谨慎推出，以确保安全。Tesla Semi 仍有望在今年晚些时候在内华达州的一家新工厂进行生产，但马斯克表示，直到明年，自动驾驶卡车运输才会成为优先事项。该公司表示，在扩大电池组制造能力方面正在取得进展，这被称为“主要限制因素”近期汽车产量增加。” 特斯拉拆除了位于加利福尼亚州弗里蒙特工厂的已停产 Model S 和 X 汽车的装配线，预计 Optimus 人形机器人生产将于今年晚些时候开始。马斯克承认，扩大 Optimus 生产规模将很困难。 “这将是我们在特斯拉生产的最难规模化生产的产品，因为机器人上的所有东西都是新的。” 底线：特斯拉的焦点始终在地平线之外。
